name: motorsportverse-remotion
description: Cinematic product film for MotorsportVerse — how the prediction engine works, start to finish. Renders to MP4, web-optimized into ../website/public/film/.

scripts.web: remotion ffmpeg -y -i output/engine.mp4 -c:v libx264 -crf 21 -preset slow -pix_fmt yuv420p -movflags +faststart -an output/engine.web.mp4
scripts.sync: mkdir -p ../website/public/film && cp output/engine.web.mp4 ../website/public/film/motorsportverse-engine.mp4 && cp output/poster.png ../website/public/film/engine-poster.png && echo 'Synced web-optimized film + poster → website/public/film/'
scripts.release: npm run render && npm run still && npm run web && npm run sync
